ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Bernardini Stephonii Sabini Presbyteri e Societate Iesu
ItacWorkItem.Notes: The text is part of a volume entitled Franscisci Remondi Societatis Iesu epigrammata et Elegiae (1606). Another copy in Selectae Patres Soc. Iesu Tragoediae (Antwerp, 1624).

Essay.EssayTitle: Sodalibus Illustrissimae congregationis primariae B. Mariae virginis annuntiatae Academicis Parteniis Bernardinus Stephonius Societatis Iesu S. D.

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
